title: lean 02_1 portfolio git handoff v2
goal: Inspect the current lean 02_1 portfolio public-surface artifacts, verify whether any relevant uncommitted files remain, and create exactly one intentional git commit only if safe and necessary.
why: The lean 02_1 portfolio slice now includes v1, v2, page-link, handoff, and local slides-grab linkage artifacts. This packet is the chained follow-up after TASK-PUBLIC-SURFACE-LEAN-02_1-ENTRY when that entry-packaging step leaves relevant repo-local changes. Git packaging must respect prior related commits, exclude unrelated pending files, and avoid empty or semantically risky follow-up commits.

constraints.notes: Treat the local slides-grab clone as reference only. Do not stage any sibling-workspace files. Do not create an empty commit. If only unrelated pending files remain, report clean/no-op status.

non_goals.description: Do not reinterpret or edit portfolio content, deck layout, or control-plane meaning.
Do not push, open a PR, or change branch strategy.
Do not stage files from outside this repository, including symbolic_links and sibling-workspace clones.

done_definition: The current lean 02_1 public-surface candidate set is inspected against git status and existing related commits before any staging decision is made.
If relevant uncommitted artifacts exist, only safe repo-local lean 02_1 public-surface files are staged and committed once.
If no relevant uncommitted artifacts exist, no empty follow-up commit is created and a clean or no-op result is reported.
Unrelated pending files, especially repo-root 2026-04-09.md, are excluded from staging.
Local slides-grab linkage is treated as reference provenance only and is not staged from the sibling workspace.
handoff_notes: Related lean 02_1 commits already known: 7874c72, 2a7beb6, 999e72b. Start by determining whether any additional repo-local public-surface artifacts remain uncommitted. Local slides-grab reference path: /Users/jaehyuntak/Desktop/Project_____현재_진행중인/vscode-markdown-review-surface/control/team/resources/external_repos/slides-grab. Upstream provenance only: https://github.com/vkehfdl1/slides-grab. This packet should be invoked only after TASK-PUBLIC-SURFACE-LEAN-02_1-ENTRY completes and only when that packet leaves relevant repo-local changes to package.
stop_conditions: Stop if the only pending path is unrelated to the lean 02_1 public-surface scope.
Stop if any candidate file appears semantically risky to include without new user review.
Stop if staging would require sibling-workspace or outside-repo files.
failure_guide: If all relevant lean 02_1 public-surface artifacts are already committed, report no-op status instead of manufacturing a new commit. If only 2026-04-09.md remains pending, explicitly exclude it and stop.
report_format: Return staged file list, validation results, final commit sha if created, and reasons for any excluded files.
